programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 2.1m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 3.6m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 21.0km/h ENE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 41.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.3m @ 14s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
